title: ZombieRool
description: Classic Call of Duty Zombies experience in Minecraft - survive endless waves inspired by World at War and Black Ops
body:
***

# 🧟‍♂️ ZombieRool - The Ultimate Zombies Experience

> **🚨 NETWORK & DOWNLOADER NOTICE:**
> This mod includes an optional in-game Map & TacZ Pack downloader. 
> * No data is collected silently. No downloads occur without the user's explicit action. 
> * On the first launch, an Opt-In screen will prompt the user to allow or deny external HTTP requests (to GitHub and our Render API for redeem codes). You have full control.

**ZombieRool** completely transforms your Minecraft **1.20.1 (Forge)** world into a fully-fledged, round-based Zombies survival experience. Survive endless hordes of the undead, rack up points, buy weapons off the walls, unlock new areas, and upgrade your arsenal to face increasingly difficult waves!

Whether you are a player looking to survive to Round 50 with your friends, or a Map Maker wanting to design the perfect custom zombies map, **ZombieRool has absolutely everything you need built right in.**

![ZombieRool Gameplay](https://i.imgur.com/w0CvpFs.png)

### 🩸 Core Gameplay & Survival

*   **Dynamic Wave System:** Zombies get faster, stronger, and more numerous as the rounds progress. Beware of the special Hellhound rounds!
*   **Points & Economy:** Earn points by damaging and killing the undead. Get bonus points for precise headshots and melee knife kills. Use your points to open doors and survive.
*   **"Last Stand" Revive System:** If you go down, it's not over. You will crawl on the ground with a pistol while your teammates have a limited time to revive you.
*   **Gore & Dismemberment:** Extremely satisfying visual feedback. Headshots cause skull explosions, and explosives will blow off zombies' legs, turning them into Crawlers!

### 🔫 Arsenal, Mystery Box & Pack-A-Punch

*   **Wonder Weapons:** Turn the tide with devastating weapons like the *Ray Gun*, *Ray Gun Mark II*, *Wunderwaffe DG-2*, and the *Thundergun*!
*   **The Mystery Box:** Spend 950 points to roll for a random weapon. But be careful—if you pull the Teddy Bear, the box will relocate to another area!
*   **Pack-A-Punch Machine:** Upgrade your weapons for 5000 points. Upgraded weapons deal more damage, hold more ammo, gain unique animated camos, and can even shoot explosive or incendiary rounds.
*   **Wall Weapons:** Buy guns and refill ammo directly from chalk outlines on the walls.

![Mystery Box and Arsenal](https://i.imgur.com/LkfS7Se.png)

### 🏆 Career, Progression & Cosmetics

ZombieRool features a fully custom out-of-match progression system:

*   **Level Up:** Earn XP by playing and level up your profile to Level 50. Reach the top and enter **Prestige** mode!
*   **ZRF Currency:** Complete daily challenges and matches to earn ZRF.
*   **The Shop & Arsenal:** Use your ZRF to unlock custom Weapon Skins and Camos in the Career menu.
*   **Mastery Camos:** Grind weapon-specific kill and headshot challenges to unlock ultimate camos like *Gold, Black Ice, Damascus,* and *Dark Matter*.

### 🥤 Perks-a-Cola & Power-Ups

Drink to survive! Find the classic perk machines around the map, or gamble at the **Der Wunderfizz** machine for a random perk.

*   **Juggernog:** Drastically increases your maximum health.
*   **Speed Cola:** Cut your reload time in half and repair barricades faster.
*   **Double Tap:** Increases your weapon's fire rate.
*   **Quick Revive:** Revive teammates incredibly fast (or get an auto-revive when playing Solo!).
*   **Mule Kick:** Carry a third weapon in your inventory.
*   **PhD Flopper:** Take zero explosive/fall damage, and trigger a massive explosion when diving from a height!
*   **Electric Cherry:** Creates a stunning electric shockwave around you whenever you reload.
*   **Plus:** Vulture Aid, Blood Rage, Royal Beer, and more!

**Power-Ups (Drops):** Slaying zombies can spawn classic drops like *Max Ammo, Insta-Kill, Double Points, Nuke, Carpenter, Zombie Blood, Fire Sale, and On the House!*

![Perks and Power-Ups](https://i.imgur.com/utjE0aJ.png)

### 🛠️ Ultimate Tools for Map Makers

ZombieRool is a Map Maker's dream come true. You don't need external command blocks; it's all in the mod:

*   **Universal Spawners:** Easily set up zone-based spawning. Tie spawners to specific "Channels" so zombies only spawn in rooms the players have unlocked.
*   **Barricades & Debris:** Place windows for players to repair for points, and block paths with debris/doors that cost points to clear.
*   **Integrated Lua Scripting:** Comes with a built-in Lua engine (`zr_scripts`). Write your own scripts to trigger custom Easter Eggs, boss fights, dialogues, and events!
*   **Meteorite Easter Eggs:** Hide meteorites around your map. When players find them all, it triggers a Secret Song!
*   **Environment Control:** Customize the map's fog (color, density), set the music tracks (including the classic "Damned" theme), and control the weather directly via the config menu!

***

### ⚙️ Mod Compatibility (TacZ)

ZombieRool is a complete, standalone experience with its own weapons and camo progression system. However, if you prefer modern firearms, the mod is fully **compatible with Timeless and Classics Guns (TacZ)**! TacZ weapons will automatically adapt to the zombies' gameplay (balanced damage, working Pack-A-Punch, wall-buys, etc.).

### 🚀 What's New

* **Safe Play Testing:** You can now create a temporary copy of your world directly from the main menu. It will automatically delete itself when you leave, keeping your original map intact!
* **Localization:** The mod is now fully supported in 6 languages (English, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese-Brazil, Russian).
* **Bug Fixes:** Numerous minor bug fixes, network optimization, and overall stability improvements.

### 🔗 Links & Community

*   💬 **Join our Discord:** [Click here to join!](https://discord.gg/HGv2r44hXM)
*   🐞 **Source Code & Issue Tracker:** [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Cryo60/ZombieRool)
